meta.title: CosmoRemote AI Control
meta.description: Manage Claude Code and Codex from anywhere with real-time streaming, remote pairing, and multi-session control.

hero.title: Manage Claude Code and Codex without losing the thread.
hero.description: CosmoRemote keeps your sessions, projects, and output in sync across devices with a polished remote workspace built for speed.
hero.note: Pre-launch. iOS, Android, and macOS apps are coming soon.

features.title: A calmer command center for multi-session work
features.description: Everything is designed to reduce context switching: launch fast, pair locally, track project history, and copy the result you need in one tap.

items.title: One-line install
items.description: Install the bridge daemon quickly and keep the setup path short on macOS, Windows, or Linux.

items.title: cosmoremote start
items.description: Detect Claude Code and Codex, start the local WebSocket server, and surface the QR code in terminal.

items.title: QR code pairing
items.description: Scan once, connect over the local network, and bring the Mac session into your pocket.

items.title: Working directory selector
items.description: Switch between saved projects and keep the right context visible in the composer.

items.title: CLI selector
items.description: Choose Claude Code or Codex per session before you send the next instruction.

items.title: Copy output
items.description: Copy the whole session or a single code block without hunting through logs.

items.title: Connection status
items.description: Know when you are local, remote, or disconnected with a clear badge and realtime state.

items.title: Realtime streaming
items.description: Token-by-token output streams over WebSocket with auto-scroll and no polling.

screenshots.title: Product snapshots that feel like the real app
screenshots.description: Since the repo ships without production screenshots, these panels present the actual interface patterns we are building toward: streaming, pairing, history, and session control.

items.title: Live stream
items.caption: A focused terminal view for active output and connection state.

items.title: Session overview
items.caption: Track active, remote, and offline sessions in one place.

items.title: QR pairing
items.caption: Scan once to connect the local bridge without extra friction.

items.title: Thread history
items.caption: Restore context from session history when you return later.

pricing.title: Free to start, Pro when you need more
pricing.description: Show the full plan ladder up front. The free tier covers the workflow basics. Pro unlocks multi-session power, unlimited messaging, and multiple Macs.

lifetime: No fake price until it exists

downloads.title: Apps for every surface
downloads.description: The app is not launched yet, so the store surfaces are clearly marked coming soon. That keeps the marketing honest while still giving users the roadmap.

cards.title: iOS
cards.note: Browse sessions, read history, and keep the connection visible from your phone.

cards.title: Android
cards.note: Pair with the same local bridge and stay in sync while you move.

cards.title: macOS
cards.note: Use the native desktop surface once the app is ready to ship.

faq.title: What people need to know before launch
faq.description: Answer the practical questions now so the product story stays clear and honest.

questions.question: Is CosmoRemote live yet?
questions.answer: No. The landing page and product narrative are ready, but the iOS, Android, and macOS apps are still marked coming soon.

questions.question: How does pairing work?
questions.answer: Run the bridge locally, scan the QR code, and connect to the Mac session over the local network with an auth token.

questions.question: Can I choose Claude Code or Codex per session?
questions.answer: Yes. The CLI selector is part of the experience so you can decide which agent backs each session before sending work.

questions.question: Does CosmoRemote support offline history?
questions.answer: Yes. Session history and offline history are part of the core free tier so you can return to the thread later.

questions.question: What does Pro unlock?
questions.answer: Pro focuses on the high-leverage workflow: parallel sessions, unlimited messages, and multiple Mac machines.

questions.question: Is the yearly plan better value?
questions.answer: Yes. The yearly plan is highlighted as the best value and saves 16% compared with paying monthly for a full year.

footer.tagline: Your agents, within reach. Built for people who live in terminal output, session threads, and remote control.
